mapper.insert:
SELECT 'PROJECT_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_' || lpad( nvl(max(to_number(substr(project_id, -4))), 0) + 1, 4, '0' ) FROM project WHERE substr(project_id, 1, 13) = 'PROJECT_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_'
INSERT INTO project ( project_id , owner_id , project_name , identifier , description , project_url , status_code , start_date , end_date , created_at , git_url ) VALUES ( #{projectId} , #{ownerId} , #{projectName} , #{identifier} , #{description} , #{projectUrl} , 'a002' , #{startDate} , #{endDate} , SYSDATE , NVL(#{gitUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'none') )
mapper.select: SELECT p.project_id AS "projectId", p.owner_id AS "ownerId", p.project_name AS "projectName", p.identifier AS "identifier", DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p.description, 1000, 1) AS "description", p.project_url AS "projectUrl", p.status_code AS "statusCode", c.note AS "statusName", p.start_date AS "startDate", p.end_date AS "endDate", p.created_at AS "createdAt", p.git_url AS "gitUrl", u.user_name AS "ownerName" FROM project p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.owner_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN common_code c ON p.status_code = c.code_id AND c.code_name = '0A' WHERE p.owner_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.project_id DESC

SELECT p.project_id AS "projectId", p.owner_id AS "ownerId", p.project_name AS "projectName", p.identifier AS "identifier", DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p.description, 1000, 1) AS "description", p.project_url AS "projectUrl", p.status_code AS "statusCode", c.note AS "statusName", p.start_date AS "startDate", p.end_date AS "endDate", p.created_at AS "createdAt", p.git_url AS "gitUrl", owner.user_name AS "ownerName" FROM project p LEFT JOIN users owner ON p.owner_id = owner.user_id LEFT JOIN common_code c ON p.status_code = c.code_id AND c.code_name = '0A' WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM project_member pm JOIN team_member tm ON pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id WHERE pm.project_id = p.project_id AND tm.user_id = #{userId} ) ORDER BY p.created_at DESC, p.project_id DESC

SELECT p.project_id AS "projectId", p.owner_id AS "ownerId", p.project_name AS "projectName", p.identifier AS "identifier", DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p.description, 4000, 1) AS "description", p.project_url AS "projectUrl", p.status_code AS "statusCode", c.note AS "statusName", p.start_date AS "startDate", p.end_date AS "endDate", p.created_at AS "createdAt", p.git_url AS "gitUrl", u.user_name AS "ownerName" FROM project p LEFT JOIN users u ON p.owner_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN common_code c ON p.status_code = c.code_id AND c.code_name = '0A' WHERE p.project_id = #{projectId}

SELECT pm.project_member_id AS "projectMemberId", pm.project_id AS "projectId", pm.team_member_id AS "teamMemberId", pm.project_group_id AS "projectGroupId", pm.role_id AS "roleId", TO_CHAR(pm.joined_at, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS "joinedAt",
p.project_name AS "projectName",
tm.team_id AS "teamId",
t.team_name AS "teamName",
u.user_id AS "userId", u.login_id AS "loginId", u.user_name AS "userName", u.email AS "email", u.phone AS "phone",
pg.group_name AS "groupName",
r.role_name AS "roleName" FROM project_member pm JOIN project p ON pm.project_id = p.project_id JOIN team_member tm ON pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id JOIN users u ON tm.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN team t ON tm.team_id = t.team_id LEFT JOIN project_group pg ON pm.project_group_id = pg.project_group_id LEFT JOIN role r ON pm.role_id = r.role_id WHERE pm.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY t.team_name, pg.group_name, r.role_name, u.user_name

SELECT tm.team_member_id AS "teamMemberId",
t.team_id AS "teamId", t.team_name AS "teamName",
u.user_id AS "userId", u.login_id AS "loginId", u.user_name AS "userName", u.email AS "email", u.phone AS "phone",
pm.project_member_id AS "projectMemberId",
CASE WHEN pm.project_member_id IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS "joinedYn" FROM project p JOIN team t ON t.created_by = p.owner_id JOIN team_member tm ON tm.team_id = t.team_id JOIN users u ON tm.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN project_member pm ON pm.project_id = p.project_id AND pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id WHERE p.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN pm.project_member_id IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, t.team_name, u.user_name
SELECT r.role_id AS "roleId", r.role_name AS "roleName" FROM role r JOIN project p ON r.created_by = p.owner_id WHERE p.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.role_name
SELECT NVL(MAX(TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(project_member_id, '[0-9]+$'))), 0) + 1 FROM project_member WHERE project_member_id LIKE 'PROJECT_MEMBER_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_member ( project_member_id, project_id, team_member_id, project_group_id, role_id, joined_at ) VALUES ( #{projectMemberId}, #{projectId}, #{teamMemberId}, #{projectGroupId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roleId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT pm.project_member_id AS "projectMemberId", pm.project_id AS "projectId", pm.team_member_id AS "teamMemberId", pm.project_group_id AS "projectGroupId", pm.role_id AS "roleId", TO_CHAR(pm.joined_at, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS "joinedAt",
p.project_name AS "projectName",
tm.team_id AS "teamId", t.team_name AS "teamName",
u.user_id AS "userId", u.login_id AS "loginId", u.user_name AS "userName", u.email AS "email", u.phone AS "phone",
pg.group_name AS "groupName",
r.role_name AS "roleName" FROM project_member pm JOIN project p ON pm.project_id = p.project_id JOIN team_member tm ON pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id JOIN users u ON tm.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN team t ON tm.team_id = t.team_id LEFT JOIN project_group pg ON pm.project_group_id = pg.project_group_id LEFT JOIN role r ON pm.role_id = r.role_id WHERE pm.project_member_id = #{projectMemberId}
SELECT project_id, project_name FROM project ORDER BY project_name ASC
SELECT project_module_id project_id module_code FROM project_module WHERE project_id = #{projectId}
